title: SO 820(E) Regarding establishing an authority to be known as National Authority for implementing the provisions of the convention on the prohibition of the development, production, stockpiling and use of the chemical weapons and their destruction signed on behalf of the Govt. of India, under Chemical Weapons Convention Act, 2000 (34 of 2000)
